title: Acute Dyspnea with Hypoxemia

patient_context.hpi: 64-year-old male with sudden onset shortness of breath. No fever. Mild pleuritic chest pain on right side.

notes: Classic PE presentation — elevated D-dimer, hypoxemia, tachycardia

title: Chest Tightness with Cardiac Risk Factors

patient_context.chief_complaint: Chest tightness and shortness of breath for 3 hours
patient_context.hpi: 58-year-old male with crushing chest pain radiating to left arm and jaw. Diaphoresis and nausea present.

notes: Elevated troponin + risk factors strongly suggest ACS/NSTEMI

title: Fever with Productive Cough

patient_context.chief_complaint: Fever, productive cough, and dyspnea for 4 days
patient_context.hpi: 45-year-old female presenting with worsening cough productive of green sputum, fever, and pleuritic chest pain.

notes: High WBC + fever + productive cough — classic CAP presentation

title: Progressive Breathlessness in Elderly

patient_context.hpi: 72-year-old female with worsening dyspnea on exertion, orthopnea, and bilateral ankle swelling.
patient_context.pmh: Hypertension, ischaemic heart disease, previous MI (2019)

notes: Orthopnea + ankle oedema + cardiac history — heart failure exacerbation

title: Young Male with Sudden Chest Pain

patient_context.chief_complaint: Sudden right-sided chest pain and breathlessness
patient_context.hpi: 22-year-old tall, slim male with sudden onset right-sided pleuritic chest pain and dyspnea at rest. No trauma.

notes: Classic spontaneous pneumothorax — tall slim young male, sudden onset

title: Post-operative Hypoxemia

patient_context.chief_complaint: Hypoxemia and dyspnea on post-op day 2
patient_context.hpi: 55-year-old female, day 2 post right hemicolectomy. New onset dyspnea and desaturation. Calf tenderness noted.

notes: Post-op + immobility + high D-dimer — high VTE risk

title: Chronic Smoker with Acute Deterioration

patient_context.chief_complaint: Worsening breathlessness and increased sputum for 3 days
patient_context.hpi: 68-year-old heavy smoker with known COPD presenting with increased dyspnea, purulent sputum, and reduced exercise tolerance.

notes: Known COPD + purulent sputum + raised WBC — infective exacerbation

title: Tearing Chest Pain with Hypertension

patient_context.chief_complaint: Sudden tearing chest pain radiating to the back
patient_context.hpi: 61-year-old male with sudden onset severe tearing chest pain radiating to interscapular region. BP discrepancy between arms noted.

notes: Tearing pain + BP asymmetry + Marfan traits — aortic dissection until proven otherwise

title: Immunocompromised with Bilateral Infiltrates

patient_context.chief_complaint: Progressive dyspnea and dry cough for 2 weeks
patient_context.hpi: 38-year-old male with HIV (CD4 count 85) presenting with progressive dyspnea, non-productive cough, and low-grade fever.

notes: Low CD4 + bilateral infiltrates + dry cough — PCP until proven otherwise

title: Trauma with Chest Wall Injury

patient_context.chief_complaint: Chest pain and dyspnea following RTA
patient_context.hpi: 34-year-old female restrained driver involved in high-speed RTA. Chest wall tenderness, reduced air entry on left, haemoptysis.

notes: High-speed trauma + haemoptysis + hypotension — tension pneumothorax must be excluded
